professional_summary:
Dynamic and detail-oriented Business Analyst with a strong track record of turning complex data into
clear, actionable insights that accelerate business performance. Known for optimizing workflows,
building high-impact dashboards, and driving data-backed decisions across multiple business units.
Adept at collaborating with cross-functional teams and translating technical information into strategic
direction. Committed to improving operational efficiency, elevating data practices, and supporting
organizational growth through innovative analysis.

responsibilities: Developed automated dashboards improving operational visibility by 40%.
Led organization-wide data-driven optimization projects resulting in measurable performance gains.
Standardized documentation (BRDs, SOPs, workflow charts) used across teams to unify processes.
Presented strategic insights directly to senior leadership, influencing quarterly business roadmaps.

Designed predictive forecasting models used to optimize marketing campaigns and reduce spending
waste.
Automated manual reporting workflows, decreasing manual labor by 60%.
Worked closely with department leads to interpret data, recommend strategies, and improve KPIs.
Managed data systems and prepared monthly performance and analytics reports for management.
Supported inventory reconciliation and improved documentation accuracy across departments.
Enhanced organizational workflows through better data tracking systems.
